about_quotes.speaker: Chauncey Morehouse
about_quotes.evidence: INTERVIEWER asks about Frank Black or Nat Schilkret; INTERVIEWEE responds only discussing Nat Schilkret ('I worked for him more than anyone else').

about_quotes.speaker: Mose Allison
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] I don’t know. But that’s the one that Frank Black from the Pixies sang on in the documentary.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mose Allison — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
